Krytox GPL 105 is a high performance, fully fluorinated oil that provides superior lubrication in a wide temperature range and unmatched chemical resistance. The inert nature of Krytox ensures it lasts longer than other chemical substances such as silicone and carbon-based lubricants. The applied lubricant does not migrate and is ideal for automotive applications, especially for eliminating NVH (noise, vibration and hardness). GPL 105 - Free from body wax, silicone etc. methylated spirits as a solvent can be used before application to achieve this. - The application amounts should be minimal, resist the temptation to apply excessively. Be aware of impurities in unwanted areas such as glass and paint as they are very difficult to remove.
